channel.title: Machine-Learning on AJ
channel.description: Recent content in Machine-Learning on AJ

item.title: Why ML Models Disagree About Stock Returns
item.description: When neural networks and gradient boosting look at the same stocks, they see different things. Here's why that disagreement is geometrically structured — and what it means for building better ensembles.

item.title: What Regularization Actually Does to Your Portfolio
item.description: Ridge regression doesn't just shrink coefficients — it encodes a belief about which directions in return space matter. Here's the geometric intuition.

item.title: What I Learned Building a Football Prediction System
item.description: FootieM8 covers 25+ leagues across 30 seasons. The models work. The markets are harder.
